Bash(c:/wamp64/bin/php/php7.4.33/php.exe -r 'try { $pdo = new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=localhost;dbname=fayxzvov_alpha'\\'', '\\''root'\\'', '\\'''\\''\); echo '\\''== sucursales coffee tiene asignadas =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT s.id, s.name, s.companies_id, s.active FROM usr_user_subsidiaries us JOIN subsidiaries s ON s.id = us.subsidiaries_id WHERE us.usr_users_id = ?"\); $st->execute\([53]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); echo PHP_EOL.'\\''== sucursales companies_id de coffee \(id 25\) =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT id, name, companies_id FROM subsidiaries WHERE id = ?"\); $st->execute\([25]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); echo PHP_EOL.'\\''== todas sucursales de la misma compania =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT s2.id, s2.name FROM subsidiaries s1 JOIN subsidiaries s2 ON s2.companies_id = s1.companies_id WHERE s1.id = ?"\); $st->execute\([25]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); } catch \(Exception $e\) { echo '\\''ERR: '\\''.$e->getMessage\(\); }')

Bash(c:/wamp64/bin/php/php7.4.33/php.exe -r 'try { $pdo = new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=localhost;dbname=fayxzvov_alpha'\\'', '\\''root'\\'', '\\'''\\''\); echo '\\''== prueba: sucursales que coffee deberia ver \(id 53\) =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT subsidiaries.id, subsidiaries.name, subsidiaries.active FROM usr_user_subsidiaries INNER JOIN subsidiaries ON subsidiaries.id = usr_user_subsidiaries.subsidiaries_id WHERE usr_user_subsidiaries.usr_users_id = ? AND subsidiaries.enabled = 1 ORDER BY subsidiaries.active DESC, subsidiaries.name ASC"\); $st->execute\([53]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); } catch \(Exception $e\) { echo '\\''ERR: '\\''.$e->getMessage\(\); }')

Bash(/c/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql5.7.36/bin/mysql.exe -uroot fayxzvov_reginas -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS qty FROM \\`order\\` WHERE subsidiaries_id = 4 AND DATE\(date_order\) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-05-15';")

Bash(/c/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql5.7.36/bin/mysql.exe -uroot fayxzvov_reginas -e "SELECT o.id, o.date_order, o.time_order, o.status, o.total_pay, o.discount, oc.name AS client_name, GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT mp.method_pay\) AS pm FROM \\`order\\` o LEFT JOIN order_clients oc ON o.client_id = oc.id LEFT JOIN order_payments op ON o.id = op.order_id LEFT JOIN method_pay mp ON op.method_pay_id = mp.id WHERE o.subsidiaries_id = 4 AND DATE\(o.date_order\) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-05-15' GROUP BY o.id ORDER BY o.date_order DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(/c/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql5.7.36/bin/mysql.exe -uroot fayxzvov_reginas -e "SELECT o.id, o.status, o.total_pay, o.discount, o.date_order, o.time_order, oc.name AS client_name, GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT mp.method_pay ORDER BY mp.method_pay SEPARATOR ', '\) AS payment_methods FROM \\`order\\` o LEFT JOIN order_clients oc ON o.client_id = oc.id LEFT JOIN order_payments op ON o.id = op.order_id LEFT JOIN method_pay mp ON op.method_pay_id = mp.id WHERE 1=1 AND o.subsidiaries_id = 4 AND DATE\(o.date_order\) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-05-15' GROUP BY o.id ORDER BY o.date_order DESC, o.time_order DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(/c/wamp64/bin/mysql/mysql5.7.36/bin/mysql.exe -uroot fayxzvov_reginas -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total, SUM\(CASE WHEN status!=4 THEN total_pay ELSE 0 END\) AS monto, SUM\(CASE WHEN status!=4 THEN discount ELSE 0 END\) AS desc_total, COUNT\(CASE WHEN status=4 THEN 1 END\) AS canceladas FROM \\`order\\` o WHERE o.subsidiaries_id = 4 AND DATE\(o.date_order\) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-05-15';")
